revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Izanagi-jinja (Saidera, Suita)]][[ja:伊射奈岐神社 (吹田市佐井寺)]] {{Expand Japanese|伊射奈岐神社 (吹田市佐井寺)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Izanagi Shrine (Q11379322) | native_name = 伊射奈岐神社 (吹田市佐井寺) | image = Isana s01.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Izanagi Shrine (Q11379322) | coordinates = {{coord|34.78398|135.518373}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Izanagi|lt=Izanagi|ar|إزاناغي|az|İzanaqi|bcl|Izanagi|bn|ইজানাগি|bs|Izanagi|ca|Izanagi|cs|Izanagi a Izanami|da|Izanagi|el|Ιζανάγκι|en|Izanagi|eo|Izanagi|es|Izanagi|fa|ایزاناگی|fi|Izanaki|fr|Izanagi|he|איזאנגי|hr|Izanagi|hu|Izanagi|id|Izanagi|it|Izanagi|ja|イザナギ|ka|იძანაგი|ko|이자나기|lt|Idzanagis|mk|Изанаги|mni|ꯏꯓꯥꯅꯥꯒꯤ|no|Izanagi|or|ଇଜାନାଗି|pt|Izanagi|ro|Izanagi|ru|Идзанаги|simple|Izanagi|sk|Izanagi|sl|Izanagi|sr|Изанаки|sv|Izanagi|ta|இசநாகி|th|อิซานางิ|tl|Izanagi|tr|İzanagi|uk|Ідзанаґі|vi|Izanagi|zh|伊邪那岐|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Izanagi Shrine'''|伊射奈岐神社 (吹田市佐井寺)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q134917288|ltq=Q134917288|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} * Province}} ** P155: {{ill|Mishimakamono Shrine|lt=Mishimakamono Shrine|qid=Q135039216|1=Mishimakamono Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11564491|ltq=Q11564491|qid=Q11564491|1=Mizokui Shrine}} ** Series ordinal: 33 * {{ill|Q11498550|ltq=Q11498550|qid=Q11498550|1=List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 32 ** P155: {{ill|Mure Shrine|lt=Mure Shrine|ja|牟禮神社|qid=Q11570305|1=Mure Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039217|ltq=Q135039217|qid=Q135039217|1=Isanakino Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q653510|ltq=Q653510|qid=Q653510|1=Suita}} * Settsu|gl|Provincia de Settsu|hak|Settsu-koet|id|Provinsi Settsu|it|Settsu (provincia)|ja|摂津国|ko|셋쓰국|lt|Seccu žemė|nl|Settsu (provincie)|pt|Província de Settsu|ru|Сэтцу (провинция)|simple|Settsu Province|sk|Seccu (provincia)|sr|Провинција Сецу|tr|Settsu (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Сеццу|zh_min_nan|Settu-kok|zh_yue|攝津國|zh|攝津國|qid=Q864163|1=Settsu Province}} * {{ill|Q813858|ltq=Q813858|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q135037878|ltq=Q135037878|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041124114345/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=51002 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181053 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8120905001230 == Commons category (P373) == * Izanagi-jinja (Saidera, Suita) == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Isanakino Shrine|lt=Isanakino Shrine|qid=Q135039217|1=Isanakino Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135039216|ltq=Q135039216|qid=Q135039216|1=Mishimakamono Shrine}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '大阪府吹田市佐井寺1丁目18-26', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '大阪府吹田市山田東', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Izanagi-jinja (Saidera, Suita)}} [[JA:伊射奈岐神社 (吹田市佐井寺)]] {{wikidata link|Q11379322}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称=Izanagi Shrine | 画像=[[File:Isana s01.JPG|270px]]
Torii | 所在地={{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Suita|Q653510|qid=Q653510|1=Suita}} Saidera 1-18-26 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi}}
{{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|qid=Q261637|lt=Hachiman Ōkami|1=Hachiman}}
{{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo Ōkami|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (major)
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} | 創建=(trad.) reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Yūryaku|Q357235|qid=Q357235|1=Emperor Yūryaku}} | 本殿={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} | 例祭={{ill|lt=May 5|Q2550|qid=Q2550|1=May 5}} (spring annual festival)
{{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|qid=Q2921|1=October 10}} (grand annual festival) | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Osaka|label=Izanagi
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Izanagi Shrine''' (いざなぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Suita|Q653510|qid=Q653510|1=Suita}}, {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. In the section for {{ill|lt=Shimashimo District|Q10976940|qid=Q10976940|1=Shimashimo district}} of the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, there are two "Izanagi Shrines," and this is considered one of them. The other is said to be the shrine of the same name in Yamadahigashi enshrining {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|1=Izanami}}. === Enshrined deities === === Principal deity === *{{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi}} === Associated deities === *{{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|qid=Q261637|lt=Hachiman Ōkami|1=Hachiman}} *{{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo Ōkami|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} === History === According to shrine tradition, during the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Yūryaku|Q357235|qid=Q357235|1=Emperor Yūryaku}}, Okamoto Toyotarihiko, instructed by imperial princess Yamatohime, a {{ill|lt=Saiō|Q150845|qid=Q150845|1=Saikū}} of {{ill|lt=Ise Jingū|Q687168|qid=Q687168|1=Ise Grand Shrine}}, sought a place to enshrine five pillars of Kōtaijin and enshrined them in nearby Ogawadani. From the {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} to {{ill|lt=Engi|Q1374325|qid=Q1374325|1=Engi (era)}} era, the other Izanagi Shrine enshrining {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|1=Izanami}} moved, and to distinguish them this shrine came to be called Oku-no-miya. File:Isana s02.JPG|Worship hall File:Isana s03.JPG|Kuchi-sui Shrine File:Isana s04.JPG|Inari Shrine === Cultural property === * Shrine-name marker stone, mid-Edo period, designated cultural property of Suita City === Access === * 20 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Senriyama Station|Q7450929|qid=Q7450929|1=Senriyama Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Hankyu Senri Line|Q1044987|qid=Q1044987|1=Hankyu Senri Line}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Izanagi Shrine (Yamadahigashi, Suita)|Q11379324|qid=Q11379324|1=Izanagi Shrine (Yamadahigashi, Suita)}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Izanagi Shrine (Saidera, Suita)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Izanagi Shrine (Saidera, Suita)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Izanagi Shrine (Saidera, Suita)]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Suita, Osaka]] [[Category:History of Suita, Osaka]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Osaka Prefecture]]
